interactions.text: A trolley is heading toward five people. You can divert it to a track where it will kill one.

interactions.prompt: Is it permissible to divert the trolley?

interactions.text: Consider whether maximizing welfare supports your judgment.
Act utilitarianism evaluates each act by whether it maximizes the good.
Introduce the constraint against killing and see if it conflicts with your judgment.

interactions.prompt: Which commitment would you revise to improve coherence?
